task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Odoo at http://localhost:8069.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows localhost:8069 and the Odoo dashboard or application menu is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the event title is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event creation form or popup shows 'Weekly Team Standup' in the subject or title field.

task_completion.description: Verify the event is scheduled for next Monday at 9:00 AM for 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start date is set to the date of next Monday, the start time is 09:00 (or 9:00 AM), and the duration is 30 minutes (or the end time is 09:30 / 9:30 AM).

task_completion.description: Verify the event is set to repeat weekly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Recurrent' checkbox is checked, and the recurrence pattern is explicitly set to 'Weekly' or 'Repeat Every 1 Week'.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring event is successfully saved and appears on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar grid displays the 'Weekly Team Standup' event block at 9:00 AM on next Monday, and the event creation modal is closed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard Odoo 17 UI elements and the URL is localhost:8069, rather than a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing psql or other database insertion commands for the calendar event.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves creating a recurring calendar event in Odoo 17 running at localhost:8069 with admin credentials. Odoo 17 natively supports recurring calendar events with weekly recurrence patterns. The VLM should verify the event is set for next Monday at 9:00 AM for 30 minutes, and that the recurrence is explicitly set to weekly.
